allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('meilisearch'\); const c = new m.MeiliSearch\({host:'x'}\); console.log\('ok'\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('meilisearch'\); console.log\(typeof m.Meilisearch, typeof m.default\)")

Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({phone: z.string\(\).min\(5\)}\); const r = s.safeParse\({phone:'a'}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(r.error\), null, 2\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.error.issues?.slice\(0,1\), null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const {z} = require\('zod'\); const s = z.object\({code: z.string\(\).length\(6, 'Enter 6-digit OTP'\)}\); const r = s.safeParse\({code:'12'}\); console.log\(r.error?.issues?.[0]\);")
